prompt: Tune configuration parameters for google/gemma-4-31b-it on rtx-pro-6000 using the precise-prefix-cache-routing strategy and the workload config in skills/llm-d-interactive-chat/config.json. Apply the changes.
expected_output: Parses the profile, calculates the required VRAM size, recommends the appropriate TP size (TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE=2), and updates the GKE Kustomize patch yaml files and runtime.env file under the target rtx-pro-6000-gemma-4-31b-it overlay.
assertions: The tune_workload.py script is invoked with --config skills/llm-d-interactive-chat/config.json and --perf-yaml skills/llm-d-interactive-chat/inference-perf.yaml
Recommended TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE is calculated and printed
The overlay files (runtime.env, patch-resources.yaml, and patch-nodeselector.yaml) are updated under the target rtx-pro-6000-gemma-4-31b-it overlay directory

prompt: Tune config parameters for Qwen/Qwen3-32B-Instruct on rtx-pro-6000 using a high concurrency profile. Demonstrate the resource capacity fallback constraint.
expected_output: Recognizes that the required memory exceeds the 3-GPU limit for standard BF16 precision, triggers the fallback rule, recommends FP8 quantization, and adjusts the recommended TP size to fit within capacity boundaries.
assertions: The tuner script falls back to recommending quantization (FP8 or FP4)
The TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE limit is kept within the capacity threshold (<= 3)
